response: The 2007 documentary "Zoo" was not more successful than the 1998 documentary "Divine Trash." While "Zoo" was selected as one of the top five American films at the 2007 Cannes Film Festival and received critical acclaim, "Divine Trash" is a well-known documentary directed by Steve Yeager and is often cited as a landmark in the documentary genre. The success of a documentary is subjective and depends on various factors, including critical reception, awards, and audience impact, but there is no definitive evidence to suggest that "Zoo" was more successful than "Divine Trash."
